name: Dzigar Kongtrul Rinpoche
bio: Dzigar Kongtrul Rinpoche is a Tibetan Buddhist teacher in the Nyingma lineage. He is the founder of Mangala Shri Bhuti, a Buddhist community based in Colorado with centers in the US and internationally. He studied under Dilgo Khyentse Rinpoche and other masters, and was a professor of Buddhist philosophy at Naropa University. He is the author of 'It's Up to You' and 'Light Comes Through.' His student Pema Chödrön has studied under him since the late 1990s.
